before.task: Phase out MCP from agentchattr — update specs 004/007 to REST-only agent integration
before.nextAction: Approved. The earlier blockers are fixed: spec 007 no longer points implementers at Speckit-only workflows in a repo without .specify, spec 004 now defines the REST replacement for shared summaries, and the plan now documents the wrapper-mediated REST interaction model for Claude, Codex, and Gemini after MCP removal. Channel-first lane workspaces, MCP-D sequencing, and repurpose-ready handling are all coherent with the rest of the spec package.

after.task: WS5: Frontend design polish — lane tabs, lane header styling, and btrain dashboard integration into agentchattr
after.nextAction: Approved. Unified design system is well-structured: shared-tokens.css provides a single source of truth for visual tokens across btrain dashboard and agentchattr. Key review findings: (1) Token extraction from style.css :root into shared-tokens.css is clean — 147-line file with surfaces, borders, text, status palette, spacing, radius, typography, motion, and shadows. (2) Status palette aligns with btrain HUD (idle/in-progress/needs-review/changes-requested/repair-needed/resolved with glow variants). (3) Dashboard serve-dashboard.js correctly mirrors the shared palette values. (4) index.html properly links shared-tokens.css before style.css, and adds Google Fonts for Chakra Petch/Exo 2/IBM Plex Mono. (5) style.css :root trimmed to app-specific overrides only. (6) Hop/chug/squish keyframe animations ported to shared layer. (7) 109 btrain tests pass, no console errors in browser. (8) Lane tabs and header render correctly with the new token palette. Visual verification confirms the unified dark theme looks consistent.

details.summary: Approved. Unified design system is well-structured: shared-tokens.css provides a single source of truth for visual tokens across btrain dashboard and agentchattr. Key review findings: (1) Token extraction from style.css :root into shared-tokens.css is clean — 147-line file with surfaces, borders, text, status palette, spacing, radius, typography, motion, and shadows. (2) Status palette aligns with btrain HUD (idle/in-progress/needs-review/changes-requested/repair-needed/resolved with glow variants). (3) Dashboard serve-dashboard.js correctly mirrors the shared palette values. (4) index.html properly links shared-tokens.css before style.css, and adds Google Fonts for Chakra Petch/Exo 2/IBM Plex Mono. (5) style.css :root trimmed to app-specific overrides only. (6) Hop/chug/squish keyframe animations ported to shared layer. (7) 109 btrain tests pass, no console errors in browser. (8) Lane tabs and header render correctly with the new token palette. Visual verification confirms the unified dark theme looks consistent.
